<!--
Before filing: reports about hardware/drivers that don't meet the minimum requirements
(see docs/MINIMUM_REQUIREMENTS.md) — most commonly, no Vulkan support — are invalid and
will be closed. This template's fields are all required; incomplete reports will be closed.
This project does not support piracy — do not include links to game/ISO/BIOS downloads.
-->
